label: 673_longterm securities_net foreign_billion net_tic
description: The U.S. Department of the Treasury releases TIC data monthly, reporting on net foreign acquisitions of long-term and short-term securities. These reports track holdings changes by foreign residents and official entities, providing insights into global investment flows.

earliest_articles.title: Treasury International Capital Data for November
earliest_articles.excerpt: (Archived Content) TG -510 TREASURY INTERNATIONAL CAPITAL DATA FOR NOVEMBER WASHINGTON – The U.S. Department of the Treasury today released Treasury International Capital (TIC) data for November 2009. earliest_articles.title: TREASURY INTERNATIONAL CAPITAL DATA FOR DECEMBER
earliest_articles.excerpt: (Archived Content) TG - 548 WASHINGTON – The U.S. Department of the Treasury today released Treasury International Capital (TIC) data for December 2009. The next release, which will report on data for January 2010, is scheduled for March 15, 2010. Net foreign purchases of long-term securities were $63.3 billion. - Net…

earliest_articles.title: Treasury International Capital Data For January
earliest_articles.excerpt: Net foreign purchases of long-term securities were $19.1 billion. Net foreign purchases of long-term U.S. securities were $36.1 billion. Of this amount, net purchases by private foreign investors were $40.3 billion, and net purchases by foreign official institutions were negative $4.2 billion. U.S. residents purchased…
